name_en: Barcelona Tourist Information Office - Plaça de Catalunya
name_local: Oficina de Turisme de Barcelona - Plaça de Catalunya

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy the Barcelona Card
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo comprar la Barcelona Card?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh pweh-DOH kohm-PRAHR lah bar-seh-LOH-nah KAHRD?

likely_response.local: En el mostrador principal, al fondo.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR preen-thee-PAHL AHL FOHN-doh
likely_response.translation_en: At the main counter, at the back.

responses.english: At the main counter, at the back.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR preen-thee-PAHL AHL FOHN-doh
responses.local: En el mostrador principal, al fondo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if city maps are available
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿tienen mapas de la ciudad?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, TYEH-nen MAH-pas deh la syoo-DAHD?

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, they are available here for free.

responses.english: Yes, they are available here for free.

phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde se reservan las excursiones?
phrases.pronunciation: BWAY-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-day say rreh-SER-vahn lahs ehk-skoor-SYOH-nehs?

likely_response.local: En la mesa de reservas, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH MEH-sah DEH reh-SEHR-bahs AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the booking desk, on the left.

responses.english: At the booking desk, on the left.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH MEH-sah DEH reh-SEHR-bahs AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.local: En la mesa de reservas, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy transport passes
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde venden los tickets de transporte?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh BEN-dehn lohs TEE-kehts deh trans-POR-teh?

likely_response.local: En el mostrador de información, aquí.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH een-fohr-mah-thee-ÓN ah-k-Í
likely_response.translation_en: At the information counter, right here.

responses.english: At the information counter, right here.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH een-fohr-mah-thee-ÓN ah-k-Í
responses.local: En el mostrador de información, aquí.
